title: Datasheet + provenance-manifest spec
context: Every reprocessed dataset must ship a datasheet and a machine-checkable provenance manifest (PLAN §6). This task ratifies the templates/specs that all later data tasks must conform to. Binding guardrails: open-access / aggregate / de-identified data only; controlled-access (dbGaP/EGA/biobanks) and identifiable patient data are out of scope; COSMIC/OncoKB/MSigDB-restricted are recipe-reference only; no clinical/diagnostic/prognostic/treatment language; research-only, not medical advice; provenance on every assertion.
objective: Define a datasheet-for-datasets template and a provenance-manifest (provenance.json) schema/spec covering inputs, outputs, container digests, versions and seeds.
acceptanceCriteria: A datasheet.md template is specified with required fields (source, license, consent, assay, sample governance, caveats).
A provenance.json spec defines required keys: pipelineVersion, containerDigests[], inputChecksums[], outputChecksums[], seed, generatedAt, parameters.
Templates include a research-only / not-medical-advice framing and are referenced from the README.
Spec is concrete enough to be machine-validated by a later CI lint gate.
